ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central ID of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the publication was published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with publishing the article */,
  "discounts" TEXT /* Discounts, memberships, and pre-payment agreements */,
  "fulltext_in_epmc" INTEGER /* Indicates if the full text is available in EPMC */,
  "license_in_epmc" TEXT /* License type in EPMC */,
  "license_on_publisher_website" TEXT /* License type on the publisher's website */,
  "accepted_manuscript" INTEGER /* Indicates if the accepted author manuscript is available */,
  "ahead_of_print" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is ahead of print */,
  "coaf_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is COAF compliant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the publisher is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "fully_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the journal is fully open access */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the editor-in-chief */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of publication */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funders" (
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "funder_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the funding agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the funding agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the funding agency is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the funding agency is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the funding agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_funders" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funders_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funders_funder_id FOREIGN KEY ("funder_id") REFERENCES funders ("funder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_status_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_comments_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., citation count, impact factor) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)
